description: Build Azure AI-powered Financial Document Sentiment and Health Analyzer - A PRO feature that analyzes bank statements, investment portfolios, and financial documents to provide sentiment analysis (spending confidence vs anxiety patterns), key financial entity extraction, and a 'Financial Health Score'. Uses Azure Text Analytics for sentiment analysis, key phrase extraction, and entity recognition. This creates a unique selling point: understanding not just numbers but the emotional and behavioral patterns in financial decisions.
steps: Create the API route at app/api/azure/financial-health/route.ts that: (1) accepts text content from bank statements or financial descriptions, (2) calls Azure Text Analytics sentiment endpoint at https://tlate.cognitiveservices.azure.com/text/analytics/v3.1/sentiment with the API key, (3) calls key phrases endpoint at /text/analytics/v3.1/keyPhrases to extract financial entities, (4) computes a Financial Health Score (0-100) based on sentiment distribution, spending patterns, and key phrase analysis (e.g., frequent 'overdue', 'penalty', 'insufficient' = low score; 'savings', 'investment', 'profit' = high score), (5) generates actionable recommendations based on the score. Free users see only the overall score; Pro users get detailed breakdown with specific recommendations.

Create the client component at components/features/FinancialHealthAnalyzer.tsx that provides: (1) text area for pasting bank statement descriptions or financial notes, (2) option to type financial goals/concerns in natural language, (3) animated circular health score gauge (0-100) with color coding (red/yellow/green), (4) sentiment breakdown chart showing positive/neutral/negative distribution, (5) key phrases cloud showing important financial terms detected, (6) personalized recommendations section, (7) Pro gate: free users see score only, Pro users get full analysis. Use Recharts for the sentiment chart (already a dependency).

Create the tool page at app/tools/financial-health/page.tsx with proper metadata, BreadcrumbSchema, and AdContainer. Target keywords like 'financial health check', 'money health score', 'spending analysis AI'.

Update app/tools/page.tsx to add the Financial Health Analyzer to the TOOLS array with icon HeartPulse (from lucide-react), color 'rose', description emphasizing AI-powered behavioral finance insights, and badge 'PRO'.
acceptance_criteria: API route at /api/azure/financial-health correctly calls Azure Text Analytics sentiment and key phrases endpoints
Financial Health Score is computed (0-100) based on sentiment and key phrase analysis
Component renders with text input, animated score gauge, sentiment chart, and recommendations
Free users see score only, Pro users see full breakdown
Tool page has proper SEO metadata
Financial Health Analyzer appears on the /tools page
findings: Build passes. Recharts Tooltip formatter must not explicitly type the `value` parameter as `number` because the library types it as `number | undefined`. Used untyped arrow function parameter instead.
